extra_descs.desc:
A rusty key is here.  It has a fish engraved upon it, and looks like it
might fit on a keyring.

long_desc: A rusty key is here, getting rustier by the minute.

extra_descs.desc:
A silver key is here, engraved with a heron - the ensignia of the highest
house of Haven.

long_desc: A shining silver key is here, glinting merrily.
A large key is lying here, as big as your hand.
A heavy sea chest is here, against the wall.
A ruby is lying here, twinkling suggestively.
A ruby is lying here, twinkling suggestively.
A candle is here, sputtering almost to the point of going out.
.This is a hidden object. The long description can only be seen with holylight. If you see this as a mortal please report the bug.
A padded couch is lying here, looking shabby.
A silver hoop of metal is here in the dust.
A pair of worn, black leather boots is lying here on the ground.
short_desc: a pair of black leather boots

long_desc: A sparkling helm of silver is here on the ground.
A wooden spoon is here, looking very mundane.
A demonic idol is here, crudely made.
A small carving of a stag is here, so masterfully done it looks almost alive.
A wooden chair is here, ready to be sat upon.

extra_descs.desc: Hey...  These diamonds look rather fake...

long_desc: A brooch is here, sparkling with diamonds.
An emerald about the size of a pixie's eye is here.
A bracelet is lying here, sparkling with jewels.
A fish is lying here, smelling fishy.
Its a brown bottle.  It might even have beer in it.
A pitcher has been placed here carefully, full of clear water.
A twisted quarterstaff is here, looking rather harmless.
A dangerous barbed spear is here, looking nasty.
An awl pike is here, taking up much space.
A dagger is lying here, its jewels sparkling merrily.
A dagger lies here on the ground, its curve looking particularly wicked.
A lenght of chain is lying on the ground, gleaming.
A large flail is lying here, looking abandoned.
A bench has been provided for weary travelers to rest upon.
An aquamarien chalice has been abandoned here.
A purple decanter is here.
A glowing red apple is here.
A yellow jar is here, humming with power.
A rose-shaped vial is lying here, glowing slightly.
A green vial is here, glowing slightly.
A wooden child's toy is lying here, forgotten.
A market stall is here, the vendors inside yelling for customers.
A dining table is setting in the middle of the floor here, heaped with food.
A big pillow is here, looking very soft and inviting.
A mat is lying on the floor here.
A loaf of freshly baked bread is here.  It looks yummy.
The magnificent bed of Degruziel lies here on the center of the floor.
A small key has been left lying here.  Maybe someone has lost it.
A small pile of chainmail lies here on the ground.
A lute is lying here, abandoned by its owner.
A steel longsword is here on the ground, neglected.
Some dog somewhere has lost it's old collar.
A long, dirty rat's tail is here on the ground.  What pollution.
A silver pitcher is on the ground here.
A large platter made of silver and with an odd handle is on the ground here.
A hat with three corners is lying here.
A pile of shimmering material is lying here.  Perhaps it might be a dress.
A rich cape made of silver thread is here, looking expensive.
A pair of banded steel leg guards are sitting here, looking rather new.
A piece of banded steel is just lying here.
A steel shortsword is on the ground here.  Pity.  It might rust.
Somebody has left a skirt here.
A small, fuzzy thing is on the ground here.  What the... It looks like a fake moustache.
A false peg leg is here, lying in the open.
A rusty cup is lying here, collecting rainwater.
A short, curving sword is lying here glimmering.
A strange curved dagger is here.
Someone has lost their pants.... hmm....
short_desc: a pair of black silk pants

long_desc: A black silk shirt is lying here, neglected.
A pile of smelly rags is here, stinking.
A woman must have dropped her purse here...
A pile of red material lies abandoned here, looking vaguely like a dress.
A cutlass is here, gleaming sharply.
A tangled rope net is lying here.
A raw fish is here... it might just be a herring.
A half-shattered broken bottle has been left here.
A wine glass lies here, discarded.
A shabby dress is here, sewn with colorful patches.
A flagon of ale lying is here, forgotten.
A wooden handcart is lying here, tipped on its side.
A ring of silver metal is here, waiting to be worn on a wrist.
A small pile of sheer material is here, looking like a veil.
A pile of wool is here, vaguely looking like a skirt.
A black leather mask lies here, ready to conceal someone's face.
A barbed whip is here, looking malicious.
A wooden spoon is lying here, looking abandoned.
A pile of chain links is here, sparkling in the light.
A strip of black cloth is on the ground here.
A bullwhip is here, looking menacing.
A saddlebag is lying here, abandoned.

extra_descs.desc:
This mace looks pretty fancy, but if used right it might be able to inflict
some damage...

long_desc: A sparkling silver, but heavy-looking, mace is lying here unattended

extra_descs.desc:
The sword is well-crafted and also looks expensive.  It has the mark of a
master swordsman on the side.

long_desc: A shimmering sword is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
The sword looks like the generic sword, except for the blue silk wrapped
around the hilt signifying loyalty to the diety of the sea.

long_desc: An unusually common looking sword is here, gleaming slightly.

extra_descs.desc: The bracer is made of top-quality black leather and seems to glow a bit.

long_desc: A black leather bracer is lying here, looking special.

extra_descs.desc:
The vest, judging by the make and material, was crafted by hand and made
well.  It is of black leather and looks comfortable.

long_desc: A pile of black leather is lying here.

extra_descs.desc:
This whittling knife looks as though it has been used a lot, but it is still
very sharp.

long_desc: A whittling knife is lying here.  It looks sharp.

extra_descs.desc:
The stylized gull form on the sword is the special mark of Haven's best
trained, their elite guardsmen.  Not many in the realm can boast their skill
with their swords.

long_desc: A sword with a stylized gull engraved onto the hilt is here, looking special.
